name: vector
context: Vector database operations — embed, index, search, and manage vector stores for AI/RAG pipelines
info: Supports Pinecone, pgvector, Chroma, Weaviate, and Qdrant. Skills cover: generating embeddings (OpenAI, Cohere, local models), upserting vectors with metadata, similarity search (cosine, L2, dot product), namespace management, and hybrid search combining vector + keyword filters. Designed for RAG, recommendation, and semantic search use cases.

scripts.name: Embed and Upsert
scripts.description: Generate embeddings and upsert to vector store

scripts.name: Similarity Search
scripts.description: Search vector store by text query

author: dojo-community
